subject: A goblin creature leaping forward in a war cry, mottled greenish-blue skin, wide-open toothed mouth, wearing scavenged piecemeal armor, one fist raised and a wrapped club-like weapon visible at its side
description: A single goblin charges directly toward the viewer in an explosive low-angle action pose. The creature has large bat-like ears, mottled greenish-blue skin, and a wide open mouth revealing prominent teeth in a wild battle scream. It wears cobbled-together armor: mismatched metal plates, leather straps, and cloth wrapping over its hunched body. One arm is raised with a clenched fist; a wrapped, blunt weapon is visible near the lower right of the frame. The background is a swirling haze of warm tan and sandy brown dust with scattered orange sparks suggesting fire or embers nearby, and a fragment of ruined stone architecture is visible through the dust at upper left. The composition is close and aggressive, the goblin filling most of the frame.
foreground: Goblin in scavenged armor charging with raised fist and weapon, mouth open in war cry
background: Dust cloud, orange embers, fragment of stone architecture
emotion: wild aggression; mouth open in a war cry, body fully committed to the charge
